backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the Ray Infotech MLM backend with user profile management, member registration, MLM tree positioning, and commission tracking, protected by role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: updating commission rate arrays to [9,8,7,6,5,4,3,2,1]% in frontend components and updating the HomePage commission breakdown display.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to their one-sentence summaries, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components and pages.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Ray Infotech MLM SPA, mounting the React app at the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, register, dashboard, and admin pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider with Layout, ProfileSetupModal, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CommissionHistor: Commission history table component that groups downline members by tree depth, applies corrected rates [9,8,7,6,5,4,3,2,1]% per level, and computes commission as a percentage of total collection (count × ₹2750) at each level.
Earnings summary card that calculates total earnings using corrected commission rates [9,8,7,6,5,4,3,2,1]% applied to total collection per depth level, displaying refund status and commission totals.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing copyright year, Ray Infotech attribution, and a UTM-tracked caffeine.ai referral link with gold styling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the app header with logo, navigation links (Dashboard, Register Member, Admin), and an authentication button using Internet Identity. Handles login/logout flow and shows mobile-responsive navigation.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple layout wrapper that composes Header, Footer, and a main content area around child components.
frontend/src/components/MatrixTreeVisual: Renders a visual tree of MLM matrix members up to a configurable depth, showing member cards with status indicators and empty slots for unfilled positions.
frontend/src/components/PlatformStatisti: Displays four stat cards (total members, fees collected, refunds issued, total commissions) calculated from the full member list, with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Shows a modal dialog prompting newly authenticated users without a profile to enter their name and contact info, then saves the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and exposing status flags to consumers.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend actor calls including user profile, member registration, member listing, downlines, admin check, and marking joining fees paid.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the Ray Infotech brand (deep navy and gold theme).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin-only page that lists all members in a searchable, paginated table and allows admins to mark joining fees as paid, with access guards for unauthenticated and non-admin users.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Member dashboard page displaying quick stats, a member search, matrix tree visualization, commission history, and earnings summary, gated behind Internet Identity login.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Marketing landing page showcasing the Ray Infotech MLM commission structure (9 levels, 1–9%) with a hero section, feature cards, and login/register call-to-action buttons.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Member registration form page that validates name, mobile, email, and optional sponsor ID, submits via the registerMember mutation, and displays the newly assigned member ID on success.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with Ray Infotech brand colors (navy/gold), custom fonts, shadows, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a Ray Infotech MLM web app, documenting architecture, commission rules, known issues, and a versioned list of implemented features.
